---
title: "genderComparision"
author: "Xiaoyan Wu"
email: xiaoyan.psych@gmail.com
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# library(rstan) 
rm(list=ls())
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(here)

fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m08_SI_SCI_VCI_EC_RP_ID_lapse.rds")
)

# Extract group-level posterior draws
draws_df <- as.data.frame( fit, pars = c( "mu_gama", "mu_envy", "mu_guilt", "mu_lambda", "mu_kapa", "mu_etak", "mu_etaa", "mu_oumiga", "mu_maxp", "mu_minp") ) 
```


```{r}
# Organize data in long format
long <- draws_df %>%
  mutate(.iter = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    - .iter,
    names_to  = "param",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  separate(param, into = c("name", "idx"), sep = "\\[") %>%
  mutate(
    idx = gsub("\\]", "", idx),
    group_lab = ifelse(idx == "1", "Female", "Male"),
    name = recode(
      name,
      mu_gama   = "gama",
      mu_envy   = "envy",
      mu_guilt  = "guilt",
      mu_lambda = "lambda",
      mu_kapa   = "kapa",
      mu_etak   = "etak",
      mu_etaa   = "etaa",
      mu_oumiga = "oumiga",
      mu_minp   = "minp",
      mu_maxp   = "maxp"
    )
  )

# Print gender difference statistics

diff_summ <- long %>%
  select(.iter, name, group_lab, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group_lab, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(diff = Male - Female) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_diff    = mean(diff),
    ci_lo        = quantile(diff, 0.025),
    ci_hi        = quantile(diff, 0.975),
    prob_gt0     = mean(diff > 0),
    prob_lt0     = mean(diff < 0),
    p_two_tailed = 2 * pmin(prob_gt0, prob_lt0),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(diff_summ)

write_csv(
  diff_summ,
  "gender_difference_summary_mu_parameters.csv"
)
```



```{r}
# Plot figures (Greek letters and subscripts used only here)

cols_gender <- c(
  "Male"   = rgb(93, 160, 198, maxColorValue = 255),
  "Female" = rgb(231, 113, 160, maxColorValue = 255)
)

param_labels <- c(
  gama   = expression(gamma),
  envy   = expression(alpha),
  guilt  = expression(beta),
  lambda = expression(lambda),
  kapa   = expression(kappa),
  etak   = expression(eta[keep]),
  etaa   = expression(eta[action]),
  oumiga = expression(omega),
  minp   = expression(p[min]),
  maxp   = expression(p[max])
)

p <- ggplot(
  long,
  aes(x = value, fill = group_lab, color = group_lab)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.30, linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ name,
    scales = "free",
    ncol = 2,
    labeller = labeller(name = param_labels)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  labs(
    x = "Posterior value",
    y = "Density",
    fill  = "Gender",
    color = "Gender",
    title = "Gender differences in group-level parameters",
    subtitle = "Posterior distributions of group-level means (μ)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  "gender_posterior_comparison_mu_parameters.png",
  p,
  width = 12,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Gender colors
cols_gender <- c(
  "Male"   = rgb(93, 160, 198, maxColorValue = 255),   # Boys
  "Female" = rgb(231, 113, 160, maxColorValue = 255)   # Girls
)
```

# alpha parameter plot: gender difference
```{r}
p_envy <- ggplot(
  filter(long, name == "envy"),
  aes(x = value, fill = group_lab, color = group_lab)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.30, linewidth = 0.8, adjust = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  labs(
    x = expression(alpha),
    y = "Density",
    fill  = "Gender",
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_envy)

ggsave(
  "posterior_envy_gender.png",
  p_envy,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```


# kappa parameter plot: gender difference
```{r}
p_kappa <- ggplot(
  filter(long, name == "kapa"),
  aes(x = value, fill = group_lab, color = group_lab)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.30, linewidth = 0.8, adjust = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  labs(
    x = expression(kappa),
    y = "Density",
    fill  = "Gender",
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_kappa)

ggsave(
  "posterior_kappa_gender.png",
  p_kappa,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```

# p_min parameter plot: gender difference
```{r}
p_minp <- ggplot(
  filter(long, name == "minp"),
  aes(x = value, fill = group_lab, color = group_lab)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.30, linewidth = 0.8, adjust = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_gender) +
  labs(
    x = expression(p[min]),
    y = "Density",
    fill  = "Gender",
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_minp)

ggsave(
  "posterior_pmin_gender.png",
  p_minp,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```
